purpose: Developer-facing archive of important Memory Mastery builds with full static snapshots and first-load screenshots for quick comparison.

rebuildPolicy.recommended: Create git tags for important milestones, then rebuild or inspect a historical version with git worktree or checkout when needed.
rebuildPolicy.whyNotBundleEveryBuild: Full snapshots are useful for developer analysis, but should still focus on meaningful commits to avoid uncontrolled repository growth.
